name: Contabo VPS MCP Server
what_it_does: Community MCP server (la-rebelion/hapimcp) exposing the Contabo Cloud API as MCP tools for cloud provisioning and management. Contabo is a budget-focused VPS and cloud server provider. Enables AI agents to manage Contabo instances — provisioning, listing, configuring, and controlling virtual private servers via the Contabo API.
use_cases: Provisioning Contabo VPS instances from infrastructure automation agents
Managing cloud server lifecycle (start, stop, resize) from DevOps agents
Listing and querying Contabo instances from infrastructure inventory agents
Automating Contabo VPS configuration from deployment agents
not_for: Teams using other cloud providers (AWS, GCP, Azure, DigitalOcean)
Enterprise cloud with complex networking/IAM requirements (Contabo is budget/SMB focused)
Production systems requiring high SLA guarantees (Contabo is budget tier)
best_when: A developer or small team using Contabo VPS for budget cloud hosting wants AI agents to automate server provisioning and management tasks.
avoid_when: You use mainstream cloud providers. Also: budget VPS providers like Contabo have different SLA and support characteristics than AWS/GCP/Azure.

auth.notes: Contabo API credentials (client ID + client secret + username + password) required. Contabo uses OAuth2 client credentials flow.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — Contabo VPS instances are paid
pricing.paid_tiers: Contabo VPS pricing by instance size; API access included
pricing.notes: Contabo VPS is paid. API access included with account. MCP server is free open source from la-rebelion.

performance.rate_limits: Contabo API rate limits apply; check Contabo API documentation

known_agent_gotchas: Contabo OAuth2 uses a non-standard credential flow (username + password + client credentials) — configure carefully
Infrastructure provisioning has real cost implications — implement budget controls before agent autonomy
Community server (la-rebelion/hapimcp) may lag Contabo API updates — verify tool coverage
Contabo budget tier — expect slower support response than major cloud providers
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cloud infrastructure management. OAuth2 credentials for Contabo API. Infrastructure operations have real cost and security implications — use least-privilege API credentials.

security_score_components.security_notes: VPS management = significant access. OAuth2 auth. Restrict to minimal Contabo permissions. Cost implications for provisioning actions.
